codeReview.summary: Failing review: the worker validated baseline tests and a small API subset, but did not provide evidence for several required cross-flow behaviors (first-visit journey, page-navigation coverage, full endpoint parity, and large-domain edge cases).

issues.description: Required first-visit and page-flow validations were not evidenced. Feature requirements include full journey and navigation behavior (features.json:1456-1472; validation-contract.md:1197-1224), but commandsRun contains only terminal/curl checks and no agent-browser flow verification.

The claim that existing API endpoints respond identically is under-verified. Evidence only lists /api/health plus /api/recipe, /api/spaces, /api/traceability, and /api/project (local/cloud), not the full existing endpoint surface required by the feature (features.json:1464).

Large domain-model edge-case verification is a stated requirement (features.json:1456) but no corresponding command evidence appears in the reported verification steps; this makes the 'all cross-flow verifications pass' conclusion unsupported.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The integration-worker skill lacks an explicit verification-only checklist that maps feature expectations to validation-contract assertions. This allowed a cross-flow feature with UI journey requirements to be completed without agent-browser evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md:24-43 defines generic procedure; transcript skeleton for session f779742d-2405-4f1d-bc3d-32839347e103 shows no agent-browser tool call; validation-contract.md:1197-1224 requires journey/navigation checks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is no enforced convention for durable evidence artifacts on verification-only features (for example, per-assertion evidence files), making review dependent on summarized command text.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff skillFeedback suggested change at handoff json:65-67; commands were summarized in handoff without attached per-assertion artifacts.

summary: Reviewed m5-cross-flows using feature metadata, handoff, commit 893b962 diff, transcript skeleton, and shared-state docs. The worker successfully ran core validators and backend smoke checks, but missed required end-to-end and UI-centric cross-flow evidence, so the feature does not yet meet its stated verification scope.
